description: Initial context mappings for SprkChat — maps entity/page combinations to playbooks

mappings.name: Matter Form → Document Profile
mappings.description: Auto-select Document Profile playbook when SprkChat opens on a matter form

mappings.name: Matter List → Document Profile
mappings.description: Auto-select Document Profile playbook when SprkChat opens on matter list view

mappings.name: Global Fallback → Document Profile
mappings.description: Fallback: use Document Profile when no specific mapping exists
